infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: Allow Safera to show your location on the map.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: Allow Safera to track your live location during an active SOS even when the app is in background.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: Allow Safera to continuously track your location for active SOS monitoring.
infoPlist.NSLocationUsageDescription: Allow Safera to access your location to provide safe routing and SOS features.

plugins.locationWhenInUsePermission: Allow Safera to show your location on the map.
plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow Safera to track your live location during an active SOS.
plugins.locationAlwaysPermission: Allow Safera to track your live location for SOS even in the background.
